  "action_vector": {

   "reasoning": "We can't just throw more money at this problem with funding_boost (0.0). Teacher_incentive is a good start, but we need systemic change, not just patches. student_scholarship will help, but we must address the underlying issues driving dropout. attendance_mandate is just an enforcement mechanism - it's a symptom, not a solution. We need to aggressively redistribute resources to prioritize the well-being of remaining staff and students. Staff_hiring is crucial, but we should be prioritizing high-leverage roles, not bulk hiring. counseling_programs will give staff and students the support they desperately need.",
   "confidence": 0.9
}
